transcript.clean_text: welcome to the highlights of stage three of bahinis which is available live on demand each day on gcn plus stage three of the race took everybody from vielsa heading south southwest finishing in dalo palestine mainly headwind on this occasion not as strong as the day before which should split the peloton but a lumpy finale would cause problems for everybody in the race thomas dickens oh weindor and alexi gushall formed the day's breakaway trek segafredo one of the main teams to chase yomo vizmo were always attentive and there's a certain nervousness around thomas again went for the second king of the mountains point to make sure that his teammate matthew holmes would continue to wear the polka dot jersey the breakaway would have just under two minutes when they crossed the finish line before the local circuit and then the fun began in the peloton serengrow anderson of dsm attacking for the first of two occasions he'd get about half a minute in front of the peloton but soon he'd be retaken as they stepped up their march towards the break corfidius had worked as well several teams would also have a go just as they were about to be caught sending up the road he'd then help his teammate pia la tour go for bonus seconds later would take three primors roglic would take two mario will save an upcoming third at the second and final bonus sprint well inside the 20 kilometer to go mark by this time and jumbo visma would help to try and control for watford they weren't the only team interested however with jakobson bennett and corona vega all dropped by this point it was going to be a sprint without the very fastest riders movie star team got wind of that and they try and set up ivan garcia cortina it was a real fight just to stay in touch at the back once we got into the final kilometer it was all uphill christopher tried to lead out wildfernard but the lead out was executed to perfection by jasper stervin from trek segafredo a crash behind involving the yellow jersey didn't put his teammate off and mass pitherson was able to finish off the job brian corker would get close as would wildfire not just but phillips are just behind but the former world champion mas pillerson from denmark taking his first world tour win in a while and the team's first world tour victory for the first time since last year's tour de france the yellow jersey back on his bike he'd be given the same time after that crash and christopher port would keep a yellow jersey a job well done by trek segafredo mass peterson winning stage three of this year's pacquidis one second now the lead for christophe laporte who wears the yellow jersey for a third successive day going into the time trial with fanart behind roglic third it's still a jumbo visma one two three on the gc so do the time trial thirteen point four kilometers around the town of mo lusso birth place of one julian ala philippe he however not present in this race he's racing in tyrian adriatico another of the races you can catch this week on gcn plus uh
